purpose: A horizontal container of Token chips. Used to show multiple selected values together with overflow handling and add/remove affordances.
whenToUse: Display selected filter values from a FilterBar
Show selected tags or categories on an object
Multi-value input where each value becomes a removable chip
Anywhere MultiComboBox or MultiInput's built-in tokenizer is insufficient
doRules: Show "+N more" overflow indicator when tokens exceed available width
dontRules: Do not exceed ~10 visible tokens — use overflow
Do not mix Token and other content inside Tokenizer
Do not omit the overflow indicator

layoutGuidance.placement: Place Tokenizer inside a compatible container (Form, FilterBar, DynamicPageHeader).
layoutGuidance.sizing: Auto width unless explicitly sized; height matches density (Compact 26-32px, Cozy 36-44px).
layoutGuidance.spacing: 8px gap from adjacent elements; 16px between groups.

contentGuidance.labelLength: See doRules for specific length guidance.

responsiveBehavior.M: May condense or collapse — see Fiori responsive design guidelines.
responsiveBehavior.S: May convert to alternative pattern (Popover, Dialog) on narrow viewports.

accessibilityGuidance.ariaPattern: Maps to ARIA pattern appropriate for input — see SAP Fiori a11y docs.
accessibilityGuidance.keyboard: Full keyboard support — Tab to focus, Enter/Space to activate.

exceptions: See pluginNotes for plugin-specific rendering caveats.
